edgeCases: Python filesystem reads not implemented (code.ts:106 always returns empty string)
Python filesystem writes not applied to virtual filesystem (stdout __FS_WRITES__ marker not parsed)
Python relative paths (./file) not supported in Node environment (code.ts:113 only checks '/')
fs.existsSync has async bug (returns Promise instead of boolean)
No error propagation for Python file read failures (returns empty instead of raising exception)
Large file reads have no size limits (potential memory issues)
Binary file support not implemented (text only)
Browser Pyodide path not tested (requires browser test environment)
Concurrent file operations in single code block not tested
